summary: Completed comprehensive testing of legal citation lookup application. All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly. Full user journey from account creation to citation search results tested successfully.
passed_tests: Citation search with valid citation '87911938c' returns 4 citations
Citation search with invalid citation returns 'Citations not found'
Frontend create account form with validation
Navigation flow: CreateAccount → UserProfile → CitationSearch → SearchLoading → Results
Profile form with all required fields (name, address, DOB, phone, email)
Date picker functionality in profile form
Citation search form with name, citation number, zip code fields
5-second loading screen with progress animation (0% to 100%)
Results page displaying Michael J. Thompson with 4 citations for '87911938c'
Not found page displaying 'Citations not found' for invalid citations
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all flows working)
